theme: Northeast China home-style restaurant counter, warm wood, red lanterns, golden fried pork slices with crispy sugar-vinegar glaze, sizzling steam, festive Chinese New Year vibe, kawaii

middle_panel.content_description: FULL background layer with: top logo (金手勺) + subtitle (东北老味·金黄酥脆) + focus character (Q版锅包肉戴主厨帽) + scene (restaurant counter, red lanterns, wood, steam, sauce sizzle) + decorations. This is the pure visual base layer. NO interactive elements: NO 5 coupon cards, NO top round help button, NO bottom CTA button, NO highlight glow ring.
